# TuneBar AI Coding Agent Instructions

## Project Overview
TuneBar is an ESP32-S3 based palm-sized media player with internet radio, music playback, weather display, and air quality monitoring. It features a custom LVGL UI designed in SquareLine Studio and uses dual-core FreeRTOS task management.

## Architecture Essentials

### Multi-Core Task Design
- **Core 0**: LVGL UI rendering, WiFi connectivity
- **Core 1**: Audio processing, RTC, button input, battery reading, weather updates, OTA firmware updates
- Tasks pinned to specific cores in [xtask.h](sketch/include/xtask.h)

### Inter-Task Communication Pattern
Two FreeRTOS queues decouple task communication:

1. **`audio_cmd_queue`**: Commands from UI/other tasks to audio task
   - Types: `CMD_AUDIO_CONNECT_FS`, `CMD_AUDIO_STOP_SONG`, `CMD_AUDIO_SET_VOLUME`, etc.
   - Payload: [AudioCommandPayload](sketch/src/task_msg/task_msg.h) with command type, filename/URL, value, source

2. **`ui_status_queue`**: Status updates from worker tasks to UI task
   - Types: `STATUS_UPDATE_BATTERY_LEVEL`, `STATUS_UPDATE_CLOCK`, `STATUS_SCREEN_UNLOCK`, etc.
   - Usage: Worker tasks send messages via `xQueueSend(ui_status_queue, &msg, 100)`

**Pattern**: Use these queues for all cross-task communication—never share mutable state directly between cores.

### Key Hardware Components
- **Display**: Waveshare 3.49" QSPI capacitive touch (172×640)
- **Audio Codecs**: ES8311 (DAC→I2S_0) and ES7210 (ADC→I2S_1), controlled via [es8311.cpp](sketch/src/es8311/es8311.cpp) and [es7210.cpp](sketch/src/es7210/es7210.cpp)
- **IO Expander**: TCA9554 (controls power amp, system power relay)
- **RTC**: PCF85063
- **Storage**: SD card (QSPI) + LittleFS (96KB partition for config, wallpapers, fonts)

## UI & Event Handling

### SquareLine Integration Rules
- UI generated by SquareLine Studio; source in [squareline/tune_bar.spj](squareline/tune_bar.spj)
- **Critical Post-Export Step**: Edit [src/ui/ui.c](sketch/src/ui/ui.c) and comment these lines to prevent animation errors:
  ```c
  // PropertyAnimation_0_user_data->imgset = ...
  // PropertyAnimation_0_user_data->imgset_size = ...
  // (repeat for PropertyAnimation_1)
  ```
- See [IMPORTANT.txt](sketch/IMPORTANT.txt) for detailed post-export instructions

### UI Event Pattern
- **Event handlers** in `src/ui/ui_events.cpp` and `src/ui/screens/ui_Screen_*.c`
- LVGL event callbacks: `ui_event_[Screen]_[Widget](lv_event_t * e)`
- Common events: `LV_EVENT_CLICKED`, `LV_EVENT_LONG_PRESSED`, `LV_EVENT_PRESSED`, `LV_EVENT_GESTURE`
- **Screen navigation**: Use `_ui_screen_change(&target_screen, fade_mode, speed, delay, init_function)`
- Example: [ui_Screen_MainMenu.c#L77-90](sketch/src/ui/screens/ui_Screen_MainMenu.c#L77-L90) shows screen transitions with animations

### UI-to-Task Communication in Events
UI event handlers send messages to worker tasks via queues:
```cpp
// Example from ui_events.cpp
UIStatusPayload msg = {.type = STATUS_SCREEN_UNLOCK};
xQueueSend(ui_status_queue, &msg, 100);

// Audio commands
AudioCommandPayload audio_msg = {
  .cmd = CMD_AUDIO_CONNECT_FS,
  .url_filename = "/your_file.mp3",
  .source = 0  // 0=SD, 1=LittleFS
};
xQueueSend(audio_cmd_queue, &audio_msg, 100);
```

## Developer Workflows

### Build & Flash
```bash
cd sketch/
pio run -e esp32-s3-devkitc1-n16r8 -t upload  # Build and flash
pio run -e esp32-s3-devkitc1-n16r8 -t monitor # Open serial monitor
```

### Debug Backtrace Decoding
Built-in task in VS Code: **"⚡ Decode ESP32 (Smart Paste)"** uses PlatformIO's `addr2line` tool with firmware ELF for stack traces.

### LittleFS Data Upload
Files in [sketch/data/](sketch/data/) must be uploaded to LittleFS partition:
- `stations.csv`: Radio station list (format: `Name,http://url`)
- **Important**: Only `http` URLs supported; `https` not allowed due to PSRAM/memory constraints
- Wallpapers and custom fonts copied to LittleFS after generation

### Adding Non-ASCII Fonts (Thai, etc.)
1. Generate font in SquareLine Studio
2. Copy `.c` font file to [sketch/src/ui/](sketch/src/ui/)
3. Reference generated examples in [sketch/test/add_thai_fonts/](sketch/test/add_thai_fonts/)

## Critical Patterns

### Memory Management
- PSRAM enabled; LVGL uses PSRAM for image buffers
- Avoid large stack allocations; use heap with `malloc` / `new`
- External memory via `mbedtls/platform.h` configured for PSRAM allocation

### Audio Library Integration
- [ESP32-audioI2S](https://github.com/schreibfaul1/ESP32-audioI2S) in [ESP32-audioI2S-master/](sketch/src/ESP32-audioI2S-master/)
- Configured in [main.cpp](sketch/src/main.cpp#L91-100): `audio.setAudioTaskCore(1)`, `audio.setConnectionTimeout(2000, 4000)`, `audio.forceMono(true)`
- Supports MP3, FLAC, AAC, WAV; streaming via HTTP and local file playback
- Mono-only by design; sample rate managed by I2S codec

### File System Access
- Two filesystems: SD card (media, playlists) and LittleFS (config, UI assets)
- [file.cpp](sketch/src/file/h) provides abstractions: `getTrackPath()`, `scanMusic()`, `loadStationList()`
- Music playlist stored in [PLAYLIST_FILE](sketch/src/file/file.h#L15) (`/music_playlist.txt`) after SD scan

### WiFi & Network
- Credentials saved to LittleFS via [network.cpp](sketch/src/network/network.cpp)
- Async WiFi scanning task spawned on demand (Core 0)
- API calls: `fetchUrlData()` with optional SSL (disabled for weather due to memory)

### Screen Timeout Logic
- `SCREEN_OFF_TIMER` and `SCREEN_OFF_DELAY` globals control backlight
- Reset on any UI interaction in [button_input_task](sketch/include/xtask.h#L30-70)
- Backlight levels: `LCD_PWM_MODE_0/100/150/255`

## Configuration & Tuning

### Hardware Pinouts
All GPIO and I2C addresses defined in [user_config.h](sketch/include/user_config.h):
- Display: SPI3 on pins 9-14, backlight on GPIO 8
- Touch I2C: SCL=GPIO18, SDA=GPIO17
- Audio: I2S BCLK, LRC, DIN/DOUT (set during `audio.setPinout()`)
- Expander (TCA9554): I2C address 0x20, bit 6=power relay, bit 7=amp enable

### LVGL Configuration
- Tick period: [5ms](sketch/include/user_config.h#L27)
- Task delay: min 5ms (responsive), max 50ms
- Resolution: 172×640, 16-bit color depth, RGB565 with `LV_COLOR_16_SWAP=1`
- See [lv_conf.h](sketch/include/lv_conf.h) for full LVGL settings

## Partition Layout
Custom partition [7MB_app_ota_2MB_littlefs.csv](sketch/partitions/7MB_app_ota_2MB_littlefs.csv) configured in [platformio.ini](sketch/platformio.ini):
- 7MB APP partition (main firmware)
- OTA partition for updates
- 2MB LittleFS for persistent config and assets

## Testing & Debugging
- Serial monitor: 115200 baud, USB CDC
- Log level: Core Debug Level set to WARN in platformio.ini (adjust via `CORE_DEBUG_LEVEL` macro)
- Test utilities in [sketch/test/](sketch/test/) (music playback, IMU calibration, etc.)
